home.slogan: Marine Electrical Service & Parts Supply — 24/7 Worldwide
home.sub:
Service available at all US ports — 24/7 worldwide coverage.
An engineer on board within hours, the right part on its way within a day.
home.tileServiceLead: Generator, MSB, propulsion, navigation, automation, safety, deck machinery, survey prep. We dispatch an engineer to your vessel.
home.tileSupplyLead: Obsolete OEM, AOG emergency, compatible alternative, repack and ship. We source, verify, and deliver to vessel / agent / port.

contact.lead: For an AOG case, WhatsApp is fastest. For RFQs, the supply wizard captures everything we need. For everything else, email works.
